# Product: DocGen

**Workflow:** product
**State:** wbs (complete)
**Created:** 2026-04-10

## WBS
### WP1: AST Parser — Extract docstrings from Python files
### WP2: Markdown Renderer — Convert parsed data to Markdown
### WP3: CLI Interface — Click-based command for running DocGen
### WP4: Watch Mode — Auto-regenerate on file changes
